roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S NOTICE OF MOT TO AND MOT TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL: SENTENCING/X: DA MAKES A RECORD REGARDING DISMISSAL OF REMAINING COUNTS PURSUANT TO PC 1192,6/X: COURT STATES ITS ANALYSIS REGARDING ROMERO MOTION AS STATED ON THE RECORD/AJW/CH2:SP   16M  : L/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDITFOR TIME SERVED 226  DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 226  SAGE  AND AN ADDITIONAL 42 DAYSFOR MILESTONE CREDITS, FOR A TOTAL OF   494 DAYS/CH1:CJ 180D /CTS: 180/X: COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION/SAORD/SA1: JOYCELYNN FERGUSON/SA2: (50 YARDS AWAY) GOOD VIBRATIONS AT 189 KEARNY STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/VF2:150/PAR/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO STAY FINES AND FEES/X: COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE: 09-10-19/PAR70/

/CAL: PTC/X: DA ORALLY AMENDS INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT 4, PC 487(A) - FELONY/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFTADV RTS:   4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 06-26-19 /PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORALMOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 3 THROUGH 16 FOR INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, PC 211, A FELONY SECOND DEGREE,/FAWC/IRRC/  /WIT SWORN:JOYCELYNN FERGUSON/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO OF LEONARD STALLINGS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF A LINGERIE RACK/X:THE COURT AMENDE COUNT 2 FROM FELONY PC 245(A)4 TOMISDEMEANOR PC 242, TO CONFORM TO PROOF AFTER HEARING,/HTA1:1 AND 3/X:COUNT 2 IS CERTIFIED,/BAIL:150000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IND22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNEDTO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
